destinations.evidence: Payload building runs synthesized obligations through predicate filtering and pool scheduled candidates through full scheduled verification before inclusion.
Predicate read failures drop synthesized obligations; full scheduled verification maps predicate read failure to PredicateReverted so payload skips the pooled scheduled tx.

equivalence_argument: Mapped in the port: payload building excludes scheduled transactions when predicate storage cannot be read, either by dropping synthesized obligations or skipping pooled scheduled txs that fail full verification.
rationale: This candidate specifically hardens predicate verification failure behavior and is not superseded by later bounded candidates.
statement: If payload building cannot read a scheduled call's predicate address from storage, it must exclude that scheduled transaction from the proposed block rather than include it without predicate verification.
suggested_falsification_tests: Mock read_call_predicate to fail for a due obligation and assert payload_candidates does not include the synthesized scheduled transaction.
Mock predicate storage failure for a pool-sourced scheduled tx and assert payload builder logs/skips it instead of including it.
summary: Predicate read failures skip scheduled transactions in the port.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Predicate storage-read failure during payload build should produce no scheduled transaction for that call/index.
title: Predicate read errors skip scheduled transactions
